name: Chocolate-Almond Velvet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate syrup, condensed milk, heavy cream, and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
3. Whip the chilled mixture until fluffy with soft peaks form.
4. Gently fold in the toasted almonds.
5. Spoon the mixture into a serving dish or refrigerator tray.
6. Freeze until firm.
7. Serve sprinkled with additional toasted almonds, if desired.
